title: [中文] Prof. Shi Ze - Some Innovative Ideas Concerning the Method of Cooperation along the Silk Road
description:
Address by Prof. Shi Ze, China Institute of International Studies, Bejing, China. 

"The New Silk Road and China’s Lunar Program: Mankind is the only creative Species!" -- 30th Anniversary Conference of the Schiller Institute, October 18-19, 2014, Frankfurt/Main, Germany
